title: ficus deltoidea subsp. deltoidea
intro: Ficus deltoidea subsp. deltoidea, also known as the Banyan fig or Bintangor, is a species of tree in the fig family (Moraceae) that is native to Malaysia and Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ficus deltoidea subsp. deltoidea include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which may contribute to the prevention of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
